title: cyclosorus harveyi
intro: Cyclosorus harveyi is a type of fern, specifically a species of the genus Cyclosorus, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. The health benefits of Cyclosorus harveyi include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve coughs and congestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are typically dried and made into teas or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
